fault_hypothesis: The overlap check on line 61 incorrectly allows adjacent bookings because its non-overlap condition uses non-strict inequalities (`<=`, `>=`). The condition should use strict inequalities (`<`, `>`) to reject bookings that touch existing slots.

spec.expr: any(not (b__1 <= s or a__1 >= e) for s, e in timeline) == any(not (b__1 < s or a__1 > e) for s, e in timeline)

constraints.intent: The result of the overlap check should be the same as a correct check that considers adjacent windows to be conflicts.

spec.expr: all(result__1[i][1] < result__1[i+1][0] for i in range(len(result__1) - 1))

constraints.intent: The updated timeline must not contain any overlapping or adjacent bookings.

spec.expr: all(b__1 < s or a__1 > e for s, e in timeline)

constraints.intent: If no overlap is detected, the new window must be strictly outside all existing bookings.

spec.expr: not __cbfl_result[0] or all(__cbfl_result[1][i][1] < __cbfl_result[1][i+1][0] for i in range(len(__cbfl_result[1]) - 1))

constraints.intent: If a booking is accepted, the resulting timeline must be valid with no adjacent or overlapping slots.
